question.label: Missing context
question.name: What are you still waiting to understand before you change an architecture assumption?
question.description: Finds the specific context gaps that could lead to wrong technical decisions.

answer: A short weekly architecture review with someone senior would help me calibrate faster.

assessment.note: Names a missing support structure — regular senior architecture review — indicating a strong clarity gap and mild lack of growth calibration.[THREAD-DEFERRED-WINDDOWN] Weekly architecture review with someone senior.

history.answer_excerpt: I am comfortable reading the services, but I am less sure how decisions are really made here.
I would benefit from a clearer guide for what to escalate quickly versus what to batch.
The runbook helped, but some practical handoff details only show up during live incidents.
